rooms.title: Single Sharing Suite
rooms.shortDescription: A private sanctuary designed for the modern professional seeking comfort and focus.
rooms.description:
Our Single Sharing Suite offers complete privacy with premium furnishings and an en-suite bathroom. Experience tranquility in a space designed exclusively for you, featuring a dedicated workspace, ample storage, and abundant natural light.

### Room Features
- Premium queen-size bed with orthopedic mattress
- Dedicated workstation with ergonomic chair
- En-suite bathroom with premium fixtures
- Floor-to-ceiling windows for natural light
- Spacious built-in wardrobe
- Smart climate control

### Included Services
- Daily housekeeping
- High-speed Wi-Fi
- All utility bills included
- 24/7 security & support

rooms.title: Two Sharing Suite
rooms.shortDescription: A thoughtfully partitioned space that balances companionship with personal privacy.
rooms.description:
The Two Sharing Suite is intelligently designed to provide distinct personal zones while sharing a larger premium space. Perfect for colleagues or friends, it offers separate workspaces and wardrobes while maintaining our high standards of luxury living.

### Room Features
- Two premium single beds with orthopedic mattresses
- Dual dedicated workstations
- Shared en-suite bathroom with dual vanities
- Individual built-in wardrobes
- Smart climate control

### Included Services
- Daily housekeeping
- High-speed Wi-Fi
- All utility bills included
- 24/7 security & support

faq.question: What is included in the monthly rent?
faq.answer: Your monthly rent is all-inclusive. It covers your fully furnished accommodation, three nutritious meals daily, high-speed Wi-Fi, daily housekeeping, laundry services, electricity, water, and access to all common amenities.

faq.question: What is the minimum stay duration?
faq.answer: We maintain a minimum stay requirement of 3 months to foster a stable community environment. For shorter stays, please contact our management team directly.

faq.question: Is there a security deposit?
faq.answer: Yes, we require a security deposit equivalent to one month's rent. This is fully refundable at the end of your stay, subject to our standard terms and conditions.

homepage.heroTitle: A Premium Botanical Sanctuary for Mindful Living
homepage.heroSubtitle: Where organic luxury meets flawless convenience in Kondapur, Hyderabad. Uncover spaces crafted for deep focus, rich community, and restorative peace.
homepage.storySubtitle: A Refined Living Experience Rooted in Biophilia
homepage.storyParagraph1: We believe that our living environment directly influences our productivity, focus, and personal peace. Created as an antidote to dull, uninspired hostels and traditional chaotic rental spaces, Botanical Living merges natural wooden warmth, abundant organic houseplants, and modern minimalist architecture.
homepage.storyParagraph2: Every detail is curated to nurture professional drive and spiritual balance.
homepage.diningSubtitle: Nourishing, Freshly Prepared Meals Served Daily
homepage.diningDescription: Outsource your meal planning entirely. We serve wholesome, hygienic, freshly prepared meals in-house.
homepage.locationTitle: An Oasis in India’s Silicon Valley
homepage.locationSubtitle: Unmatched Connectivity and Serene Surrounding Gardens
